subject: English
title: The Happy Prince – Easy Short Notes

key_points: The story 'The Happy Prince' is written by Oscar Wilde
The Happy Prince is a statue placed on a tall column in the city
The statue is covered with gold leaves and decorated with sapphires and a ruby
A swallow becomes the prince’s friend and helper
The prince gives away his jewels and gold to help poor people
characters: The Happy Prince – A compassionate statue who helps the poor
The Swallow – A loyal bird who helps the prince distribute his riches
The Mayor – A leader who judges things by their appearance
literary_devices: Irony – The prince is called happy but feels sorrow after seeing suffering
Symbolism – The prince’s heart symbolizes compassion
exam_tips: Remember the prince sacrifices his jewels and gold
Mention the swallow’s loyalty and sacrifice
Focus on kindness and compassion as the central message
